title: orchis lusitanica
intro: Orchis lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as tinctures, infusions, or salves, to be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
